programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny gets ganged up on in Riverside by the field of buyers. Dave buys an old unit and takes a voyage back in time. Ivy scores a locker that inspires him to go clubbing. Emily puts her foot down with a statement buy on a massive locker.

programme.desc: Willie and the boys raid a junkyard to build a biking track for the littles. Will and Abby get a lesson in family dynamics after moving back in with Willie and Korie. Plus, Bella and Jacob open up about having kids, all while navigating some unconventional advice from Uncle Si and Rebecca.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Lisa keeps getting her lockers taken from her, and it makes her hopping mad; Kenny goes in for a banjo but comes out with a harmonica; Dusty and Lupe find the locker of her dreams; Ivy finds a vehicle in his locker, just not the one he expected.
